desc: At the age of 15, I took a leap of faith, moved 300km away from my hometown to enroll in the most prestigious science high school, High School for Gifted Students to pursue my own interest in Mathematics. I took Mathematics specialization, joined the High School's VOI temporary team, had the chance to learn about core CS concepts, got the chance to practice Competitive Programming. Looking back, these early years really shaped my foundational love for Pure Math, Computer Science and AI.
